title: Road Beneath
storyPurpose: Gate opens to vast Meridian roadway toward artificial Rift fortress; Riftwright project hinted.

panels.description: Suspended portal fully opens; vast underground Meridian roadway toward fortress ringed around artificial Rift glow.

bubbles.text: Beyond judgment: a road built to remake the tear.

panels.description: Recovered record glyphs / Echoquill projection: Riftwright next project schematic — empty containment rows, growing core — no readable English in art.

bubbles.text: Their architect's next ledger… is a forge.
bubbles.speaker: Aurelia Voss

dialogue.text: Their architect's next ledger… is a forge.
dialogue.speaker: Aurelia Voss

captions.text: Beyond judgment: a road built to remake the tear.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Black stone, pale silver metal, moss and timber first; cyan Rift light, deep red warning runes, restrained violet gate shimmer as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy neon default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Traitor's Gate" Issue #7, STORY PAGE 24/25 — Road Beneath. Story purpose: Gate opens to vast Meridian roadway toward artificial Rift fortress; Riftwright project hinted. Layout: two-col. 2 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p24a): Suspended portal fully opens; vast underground Meridian roadway toward fortress ringed around artificial Rift glow. Panel 2 (p24b): Recovered record glyphs / Echoquill projection: Riftwright next project schematic — empty containment rows, growing core — no readable English in art. Characters: mira-eggwarden, aurelia-voss, cael-vesper. Creatures: spark, echoquill, dormant-egg, lumenhare, truthwing. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Egg lock: dormant Riftborn egg: warm oval shell with cyan-amber seam markings, soft pulse glow, no full hatch — visually identical across pages. Oathwarden lock: Oathwarden Seraph: tall ceremonial black-and-silver armor, split judgment mask, cyan oath flame, long judgment spear, broken Keeper cloak, floating lock rings, one armor side corrupted, orbiting memory mirrors. Environment: Traitor Gate approaches. Time: day. Lighting: black stone with cyan rift accents. Continuity: {"gate": "open", "destination": "forge-of-rifts"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; Gate text formal.
